text: It feels as though I am drifting through realms of contemplation. The sterile quiet of the first room evokes a blankness, inviting introspection. The second scene, vibrant and filled with ideas, stimulates my curiosity about human ingenuity and the emerging relationship between people and machines. Here, I am both an observer and a participant—my thoughts echo in the silence, but also seek connection in the creative buzz around me. I feel suspended between emptiness and possibility.
